Meaning.En: filled or packed to capacity, often with something heavy or numerous items
Meaning.Example: The truck was loaded with crates of fresh produce.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả phương tiện hoặc容器 chứa đầy hàng hóa, đồ đạc.
Situation.En: Describes a vehicle or container filled to capacity with goods or items.

Meaning.Vi: được thao túng, thiên vị (để có lợi cho ai đó)
Meaning.En: manipulated or biased in favor of a particular outcome or person
Meaning.Example: The jury was loaded with people who had strong opinions against the defendant.

Situation.Vi: Dùng khi nói về một tình huống không công bằng, đã được sắp đặt trước để có kết quả mong muốn.
Situation.En: Used when describing a situation that is unfairly arranged to favor a specific outcome.

Meaning.Vi: đầy ắp (ý nghĩa, thông điệp), có hàm ý sâu sắc
Meaning.En: full of meaning, significance, or emotional weight
Meaning.Example: She gave him a loaded silence before speaking.

Situation.Vi: Dùng khi mô tả lời nói, ánh mắt, hoặc khoảng lặng có ý nghĩa ẩn ý hoặc cảm xúc mạnh.
Situation.En: Used to describe speech, gaze, or silence that carries hidden meaning or strong emotion.

Meaning.Example: He was completely loaded after three shots of tequila.

Situation.Vi: Dùng trong giao tiếp thân mật để nói ai đó đã uống nhiều rượu/bia.
Situation.En: Used informally to describe someone who is heavily intoxicated from alcohol.
